commands.author: leno23
commands.command:
re-review: mantis reported the native telegram proof could not reliably capture the voice-message typing cue because it was too brief. i changed the voice-only direct-message preflight path to await the telegram `sendchataction(typing)` request before starting audio transcription, so the status request is accepted before stt begins instead of being fire-and-forget.

validation:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.typing.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.body.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check`
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=452939dff7b0d06e4e61d16a2c6a6bf537573748)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional `append?: boolean` write mode across shared write contracts, host/sandbox write operations, and focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +150, Tests +410. Total +560 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main and v2026.6.8 expose ordinary `write` as overwrite-only, while the linked canonical issue has multiple reports of append-intended writes truncating existing memory/workspace files.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can address the two concrete PR findings if maintainers keep the `append?: boolean` API direction.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
